name: Thread Creation into a System Process
notes: This rule triggers when a process is creating a thread into a system process.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001845) CreateRemoteThread
when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Remote Thread Creation False-Positives, Thread Creation into lsass Process
when any of Target Process Name (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) Windows Sensitive Processes - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)

when the event matches "Process Path" not in ('C:\Windows\VeeamVssSupport\VeeamGuestHelper.exe','C:\Windows\System32\wbem\WmiPrvSE.exe','C:\Windows\System32\svchost.exe','C:\Windows\System32\wininit.exe','C:\Windows\System32\csrss.exe','C:\Windows\System32\services.exe','C:\Windows\System32\winlogon.exe','C:\Windows\System32\audiodg.exe') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Thread Creation into a System Process on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001845) CreateRemoteThread
AND NOT when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Remote Thread Creation False-Positives, Thread Creation into lsass Process
AND when any of Target Process Name (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) Windows Sensitive Processes - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)

AND when the event matches "Process Path" not in ('C:\Windows\VeeamVssSupport\VeeamGuestHelper.exe','C:\Windows\System32\wbem\WmiPrvSE.exe','C:\Windows\System32\svchost.exe','C:\Windows\System32\wininit.exe','C:\Windows\System32\csrss.exe','C:\Windows\System32\services.exe','C:\Windows\System32\winlogon.exe','C:\Windows\System32\audiodg.exe') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Process Created a Thread into System Process
Event description: Process Created a Thread into System Process
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
